scope: Classification-only Purgatorium triage packet for IF09-FIND-001.
classification_reasoning_summary: IF09-FIND-001 is the only validated mandatory Purgatorium handoff finding in the IF10 graph and handoff manifest.
The IF10 graph exposes severity=medium and affected_layer=active_context_governance directly for IF09-FIND-001.
The Purgatorium roadmap states that PURG-S0 through PURG-S3 are conditional tracks derived from severity and affected layer.
PURG-S3 is the only roadmap-defined track whose trigger explicitly starts from medium severity.

The IF10 remediation objective is described as Canonical source packet SHA verification hardening, which aligns with a hardening track more closely than with catastrophic, critical-integrity, or high-severity operational tracks.
The roadmap does not provide a stricter layer-to-track lookup table for active_context_governance findings, so the classification remains medium confidence rather than high confidence.
blocked_reason: The track can be recorded as S3 with medium confidence from explicit handoff severity plus hardening intent, but no canonical PURG-01.2 successor is defined in live routing without inventing a new gate name or auto-opening PURG-02.
